name: Checker Bus Of Marquette

name: Koch Bus Svc
officers: Brian Koch (current owner/operator); Curtis Koch (father); Victor Koch (founder)
registry_source: Minnesota Secretary of State Business Filings (mblsportal.sos.mn.gov) - interactive portal; entity identified as active MN corporation. Related entity 'KOCH SCHOOL BUS SERVICE INC' (USDOT 26881, 148 power units, 150 drivers) also active in Waconia.
notes: FMCSA address (Waconia) does not match input address (12830 Ventura Ct, Shakopee). Shakopee may be a satellite terminal; Waconia is legal HQ. Company founded 1938 by Victor Koch; now 3rd generation. Combined Koch Bus Service Inc + Koch School Bus Service Inc fleet ~150 buses across multiple MN locations including Chaska, Mayer, Shakopee, Waconia, Watertown.

name: Goodman Bus Svc Inc
registry_source: Minnesota Secretary of State Business Filings (mblsportal.sos.mn.gov) searched - no clear active MN entity match found. No FMCSA carrier match in Minnesota with name 'Goodman Bus Service'.
notes: NO confident match. SAFER search for 'GOODMAN' in MN returned only: CRAIG GOODMAN SR (Vergas), DAVID GOODMAN TRANSPORT (Lindstrom), GOODMAN LOGISTICS GROUP/LLC (Shakopee, USDOT 2384043 - logistics not buses), GOODMAN TRUCKING LLC (Avon). Only 'B H GOODMAN BUS SERVICE INC' / 'GOODMAN BUS SERVICE' (USDOT 1961364) exists nationally - located at 14902 HENRY RD, HOUSTON, TX 77060 (NOT Saint Paul, MN). Input address '2025 Centre Pointe Blvd, Saint Paul, MN 55120' is actually in Mendota Heights and is occupied by TCC Materials/Cemstone - not a bus company. Likely the input record was mis-aggregated: either the company is defunct/dissolved, or the data source confused a TX bus company with a MN address. Recommend manual verification.
